compiled_state.title: Story completion lacks RED marker removal verification in .test-index
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: When a TDD story is completed (feature implemented, test now passing), the process does not enforce that the RED marker for the implemented test is removed from .test-index. This allows a broken TDD cycle where: (1) RED test written + marker added, (2) feature implemented + test passes, (3) commit proceeds with STALE RED marker still in .test-index — silently breaking the next commit when the stale marker triggers STALE RED MARKER detection. The done definition for any story that adds a RED marker should require removal of that marker when the feature is implemented.

comments.body: Classification: llm-behavioral. Sprint SKILL.md done definitions lack RED marker removal requirement.
comments.author: Main
